data.name: Daiyan

weaponImprint.name: Heavy Strings
weaponImprint.trait: Gains 1 random buff for 1 turn if the user has full HP at the start of the action.
weaponImprint.effect: Before attacking, there is a 20%/36%/25%/68%/84%/100% chance to cleanse 1 buff from the target. For every 3/3/3/2/2/1 tiles move, damage is increased by 5%/7.5%/10%/10%/10%/10%, up to a maximum of 10%/15%/20%/20%/20%/20%. Critical damage against targets not protected by Cover is increased by 10%/10%/10%/10%/15%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage to PMCs is increased by 2.5%, critical damage is increased by 5%.

data.effects: A gentle and reserved Doll who roams the lands with her guzheng and her bandmates from "Monsoon". When she plucks the strings, she evokes the deepest desires buried in the hearts of her listeners - listening to all, and embracing all.

skills.name: Plucking Strings
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Swift Harmony
skills.description:
At the start of the action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. When performing an active attack against a target not protected by Cover, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

Before taking targeted damage, if the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 2, launches [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing light ammo Physical damage equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability damage, and permanently gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. This can be triggered once per turn.
If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 3, increases damage dealt by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. When performing an active attack against a target not protected by Cover, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

Before taking targeted damage, if the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 2, launches [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing light ammo Physical damage equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability damage, and permanently gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. This can be triggered once per turn.
If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 3, increases damage dealt by 20%.
If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 5, increases damage dealt by 40% instead, and stability damage dealt to the attacker before taking targeted damage increases by 2 points. The initial damage multiplier increases by 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the action, gains 1 point of Confectance Index and 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. When performing an active attack against a target not protected by Cover, gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

Before taking targeted damage, if the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 2, launches [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], dealing light ammo Physical damage equal to 150% of attack and 4 points of stability damage, and permanently gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f]. This can be triggered once per turn.
If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 3, increases damage dealt by 20%.
If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 5, increases damage dealt by 40% instead, and stability damage dealt to the attacker before taking targeted damage increases by 2 points. The initial damage multiplier increases by 30%.
When the number of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks reaches max, ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction when attacking Exposed enemies.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks is greater than 5, increases damage dealt by 40% instead, and stability damage dealt to the attacker before taking targeted damage increases by 2 points. The initial damage multiplier increases by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When the number of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks reaches max, ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction when attacking Exposed enemies.

skills.name: Absolute Tuning
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, cleanses 1 buff, and deals Physical damage equal to 150% of attack to them.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, cleanses 1 buff, and deals Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. If the target has no buffs to cleanse, gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] after the attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target has no buffs to cleanse when during the attack, gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] after the attack.

skills.name: Qing Shang Harmony
skills.description: Gains 3 stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], as well as [effect:145ba1c0-00e7-4b51-9b9f-0f65bf8220b1] for 1 turn. Gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gains 6 stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], as well as [effect:145ba1c0-00e7-4b51-9b9f-0f65bf8220b1] for 1 turn. In addition, gains 1 instance of [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks gained by 3.

skills.name: Ethereal Resonance
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 190% of attack. For every 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn. After attacking, consumes all stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] and gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] permanently, up to a maximum of 3 stacks.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 190% of attack. For every 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn. After attacking, consumes all stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] and gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] permanently, up to a maximum of 6 stacks.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 190% of attack. For every 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn. After attacking, consumes all stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] and gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] permanently, up to a maximum of 6 stacks. For every 1 enemy unit that dies on the field, gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] permanently.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase the stack limit of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] by 3 stacks.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: For every 1 enemy unit that dies on the field, gain 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] permanently.

keys.effect: At the start of the action, gains [effect:2eaedbcb-e86c-431a-ac54-2fcb00ebfb70] for 1 turn. This has a cooldown of 1 turn.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - Shattering Stone and Silk

keys.effect:
For each stack of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] Daiyan possesses, ignores 10% of enemy target's defense when attacking.

At the end of Daiyan's action, she gains 2 stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], and for each stack of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] she gains 1 point of Confectance Index.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key - Flowing Melody of the Clouds

keys.effect:
When Daiyan uses the Ultimate skill Ethereal Resonance and performs [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], she gains 1 stack of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f].

At the end of the round, if Daiyan has not performed [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800] was performed, she gains 2 stacks of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] and the damage multiplier of the next active attack is increased by 150% while stability damage dealt is increased by 4 points.

After using the Ultimate skill Ethereal Resonance, Daiyan performs 1 additional attack against the target. For each stack of permanent [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], said attack deals Physical damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of Stability damage.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key 2 - Flowing Melody of the Clouds

keys.effect: When Daiyan has [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], increases mobility by 1 tile.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
For each point of additional mobility before the attack, critical rate increases by 10%.
If Daiyan's mobility is higher than the target's, gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] before using an active attack.
For every 3 stacks of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f], cleanses 1 additional buff when using the active skill Absolute Tuning.
After using Qing Shang Harmony, if a kill occurs in this turn, recovers 20% max HP and 2 points of stability index.

vertebrae.effect: If the target has no buffs to cleanse when during the attack, gains 1 stack of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] after the attack.

doll.name: Daiyan
doll.effects: A gentle and reserved Doll who roams the lands with her guzheng and her bandmates from "Monsoon". When she plucks the strings, she evokes the deepest desires buried in the hearts of her listeners - listening to all, and embracing all.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Interceptions is increased by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is recued by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deals 3 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Increase critical rate and critical damage by 3% maximum of 6 stacks. Shares stacks with [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] and cannot be consumed. Gain 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] after using an active attack. This buff cannot be cleansed.
Before launching active attacks, deals stability damage equal to the number of [effect:4f2541d9-a69e-4988-90fd-d5fa6c80510f] stacks. Can trigger 1 time. This effect cannot be cleansed.
Increases critical rate and critical damage by 3%, maximum of 10 stacks. Gains 6 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] after using an active attack. This buff cannot be cleansed.
